Summary
DescriptionFormula1 Circuit Catalunya 2021.svg
English: Track map for Circuit de Catalunya. Based on File:Formula1 Circuit Catalunya.svg.
Date
21 April 2021
Source
Own work
Author
GabrielStella
Other versions
PNG showing the track as of 1997
JPEG with fancy patterns dated 2007 - obsolete
JPEG with fancy patterns dated 1997
Older SVG showing the 1997 course
PNG showing the current route - obsolete
SVG version of Image:Circuit Catalunya 2007.png
SVG showing the 1997-2006 layout on a fancy background with little data
PNG version of Image:GrandPrix Circuit Spain 2006.svg
Misnamed PNG showing the 1997-2006 route and little else
SVG showing the 2007-2020 course
Camera location41° 34′ 09.9″ N, 2° 15′ 26.9″ E View this and other nearby images on: OpenStreetMap 41.569417; 2.257472
This W3C-unspecified vector image was created with Inkscape .
